title: The Storm and the Wipeout
description: Past Continuous (was/were + -ing) for interrupted actions. Bia WAS SURFING when the storm HIT.
summary_pt_br: Past Continuous para ações em progresso no passado, e Past Simple para a ação que interrompe. Fórmula: 'While I WAS WALKING, it STARTED to rain'.

scenes.text_en:
I WAS PADDLING out when I SAW the dark sky.
I WAS THINKING about turning back — and the wind HIT hard.
I WAS DROPPING into a wave when lightning FLASHED.
I FELL. I SWAM. My dad CAME running. The storm WON.
scenes.text_pt:
Eu estava REMANDO quando vi o céu escuro.
Estava PENSANDO em voltar — e o vento bateu forte.
Estava DROPANDO uma onda quando o raio brilhou.
Caí. Nadei. Meu pai veio correndo. A tempestade venceu.

scenes.title: Past Continuous — the background action
scenes.body_en: Structure: WAS/WERE + verb-ing. Use it for actions IN PROGRESS at a past moment. Often paired with Past Simple for the interrupting event. 'I was studying when the phone rang.' Background = past continuous; interruption = past simple.
scenes.body_pt: Estrutura: was/were + verbo-ing. Ação em ANDAMENTO no passado, frequentemente interrompida por outra (Past Simple). 'I was studying when the phone rang.' Fundo = continuous; interrupção = simple.

examples.en: While I was walking home, I met Maya.
examples.pt: Enquanto eu caminhava, encontrei a Maya.

examples.en: He was cooking when the power went out.
examples.pt: Ele estava cozinhando quando a luz caiu.

exercise.question: Complete: 'I ___ ___ (paddle) when the storm hit.'
exercise.explanation: Past Continuous: was + paddling. Background action interrupted by 'hit'.

exercise.question: Which is correct?
options: While I watched TV, the phone rang
While I was watching TV, the phone rang
While I was watching TV, the phone was ringing
Both B and C are possible
exercise.explanation: B is textbook. C is also possible when both actions overlap continuously.
exercise.hint_pt_br: B é o padrão. C funciona se as duas ações se sobrepõem continuamente.

turns.en: What were you doing out there?!
turns.pt: O que você tava fazendo lá fora?!

turns.en: I was trying to catch one last wave.
turns.pt: Eu tava tentando pegar uma última onda.

turns.en: When I arrived, you were climbing out of the water.
turns.pt: Quando cheguei, você tava saindo da água.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "The Storm and the Wipeout". Past Continuous (was/were + -ing) for interrupted actions. Bia WAS SURFING when the storm HIT. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "The Storm and the Wipeout". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'The Storm and the Wipeout'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "The Storm and the Wipeout".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: British Council · A2
sources.pt_hint: Leituras A2 com exercícios de compreensão.
